fields.Name: Realtime
fields.Description: Streaming, full-duplex, tool-calling models that own the listen-reason-speak loop themselves (e.g. Gemini Live, GPT Realtime). Used by the Realtime agent type for low-latency, bidirectional voice (and later video) conversations. Resolved through the ClassFactory by AIModelType + DriverClass, the same as LLM/Embeddings/Image models, but exposed via the BaseRealtimeModel primitive rather than request/response BaseLLM.
